messages.body:
Review the wish plan at .genie/wishes/dependency-modernization/WISH.md using the Plan Review checklist:

- [ ] Problem statement is one sentence and testable
- [ ] Scope IN has concrete deliverables
- [ ] Scope OUT is explicit — boundaries stated
- [ ] Every task has testable acceptance criteria
- [ ] Tasks are bite-sized and independently shippable
- [ ] Dependencies tagged (depends-on / blocks)
- [ ] Validation commands exist for each execution group

Check every group (G1-G5) against the acceptance criteria. Verify the dependency graph makes sense. Flag any gaps with severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW). Return a verdict: SHIP, FIX-FIRST, or BLOCKED.

Important context from the trace report:
- drizzle-orm 0.38.4 → 0.45.1 (89 importing files in packages/db + server)
- zod 3.25.76 → 4.3.6 (17 importing files in packages/shared, server, plugins/sdk)
- better-auth 1.4.18 → 1.5.5 (depends on drizzle-orm >=0.41 + zod >=4)
- vitest 3.2.4 → 4.x (fixes glob@10.5.0 deprecation)
- @esbuild-kit/* and intersection-observer are upstream-only deprecations

Do NOT modify any files. Read-only review only.

Plan review of .genie/wishes/upstream-pr-strategy/WISH.md

Use the Plan Review checklist:
- [ ] Problem statement is one sentence and testable
- [ ] Scope IN has concrete deliverables
- [ ] Scope OUT is explicit — boundaries stated
- [ ] Every task has testable acceptance criteria
- [ ] Tasks are bite-sized and independently shippable
- [ ] Dependencies tagged (depends-on / blocks)
- [ ] Validation commands exist for each execution group

Also verify:
1. G2 claims test harness has no multiuser imports — verify by reading server/src/__tests__/helpers/test-app.ts and checking if any imported route/service requires multiuser-only code (userRoutes, email service, etc.)
2. G3 migration renumbering — verify the journal update logic is complete (snapshot copy from 0029 for data-only backfill is correct?)
3. G4 file scope — verify ~70 files claim by checking git diff upstream/master origin/master --name-only count minus test files minus HMR files
4. Check that PR descriptions mention the backfill migration purpose (owners losing permissions)

Return verdict: SHIP, FIX-FIRST, or BLOCKED with severity-tagged gaps.
Do NOT modify any files. Read-only review only.
